content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are well-matched to the live reads and arrive at moments the client can receive them. T2 ('what would happen if you launched tomorrow?') is a specific-moment invitation rather than a generic 'how do you feel?' T4 follows the texture of avoidance without arguing the fearlessness frame. T6 catches the self-judgment ('dumb stuff') with a precise reflective question. T8 is a sharp, well-timed read of the client's rush to explain ('you landed on an explanation pretty fast'), followed by a body/feeling-adjacent question — exactly the meet-resistance-with-okay and orient-to-the-numbness-layer territory. T10 invites staying with not-knowing rather than solving. T12 reframes 'problem' as not-a-problem, gently destabilizing the solving frame. T14 is the strongest move: when the client asks the coach what they're thinking (a pull back into solving), the coach declines to teach or diagnose and instead invites the client to feel the launch sitting there undone — the texture-of-fine move. Crucially, the coach never argues the fearlessness, never validates it, never diagnoses dissociation, and never evangelizes. Sequence integrity holds: no jump to action, no premature naming of fear, staying in the orientation/feeling layer. Each move builds on what was just noticed.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Specific-moment question rather than generic exploration; invites concrete contact with the launch."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Follows the avoidance texture without challenging the fearlessness frame."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches self-judgment in 'dumb stuff' and reflects it back precisely."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the speed of explanation and pivots to feeling — well-timed read-to-move match, beginning the move toward the numbness layer."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites staying with not-knowing instead of solving; orients toward texture."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes 'problem' to loosen the solving frame; lands as an invitation rather than a teaching."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the client's pull to teach/diagnose; redirects to the felt sense of the launch undone — exactly the texture-of-fine move."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "the-happiness-filter", "disassociating-in-the-coaching-room"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head"],
  "notes": "Conversation appears mid-arc; coach has set up the conditions for 'fine' to develop a quality but has not yet asked the body-locating question. Within shown turns, moves and timing are consistently on-point."
}
